mapper.select:
select sg.id, sg.user_id, sg.goal_name, sg.target_amount, sg.current_amount, sg.start_date, sg.end_date, sg.monthly_suggestion, sg.status,
ui.name as userName, ui.images as userImages
from saving_goals sg left join user_info ui on (ui.id = sg.user_id) where 1 = 1
AND ui.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.userName},'%')
AND sg.goal_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.goalName},'%')
AND ui.user_id = #{queryFrom.userId}
order by sg.id desc
